feed.title: AO3 - Dick Grayson/Jason Todd (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Dick Grayson/Jason Todd on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: It’s Not a Kink (I Swear)
entry.summary:
Author: Whyyyyyyyyfcky

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,044Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 298

Summary: It was supposed to be a harmless wager. A joke. A moment to tease and move on. But something shifts. The air grows heavier, the silences longer. And somewhere in the shadows of the Batcave, under the weight of old fabric and older memories, a line is crossed—and nothing feels quite the same again.

entry.title: Wearing That Smile and Looking Like That
entry.summary:
Author: Nobyl

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,476Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 35

Summary: It had taken Jason a while to get used to the whole “Star Sapphire” thing. Just as he got comfortable with everything Hal Jordan had to go and drag him and Dick into space, where Jason couldn't escape his stupid crush on the man.   Written for a prompt DCDreamscapes left to write Star Sapphire Jason based on @kadriiart on tumblrs Jason

entry.title: Putting Down The Roses, Picking Up The Sword
entry.summary:
Author: elwon

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,000Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 103

Summary: Of course, it's just Jason's luck that they guy who blew him in the pub bathroom last night would turn out to be the newest member of the taskforce. Of course, Dick Grayson doesn't mind that Jason never takes his mask off. Of course these idiots are totally in love with each other, and everyone, including Captain Wayne knows about it. (Or the one where Jason is Ghost from CoD MW2(2019) and Dick is Soap.)

entry.title: soft feathers can't make a cruel bird kind
entry.summary:
Author: Faye_Ferox

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,948Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 17

Summary: Dick reminds Jay of a field of poppies, where the distracting beauty of bright crimson-coloured petals hides the fetid rot of the grave-soil where they grow amidst human ash and rotted bone.

entry.title: Hush Little One, You Are Safe Now
entry.summary:
Author: Gaynightwing03

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,737Chapters: 27/?Kudos: 1,327

Summary: Damian has tried his best to become the partner that his Father needs, but it seems that his Father does not approve of Robin's style and methods. A night of yelling is enough to set things in motion, were Damain realizes that his Father isn't who he wants to be partners with, but perhaps a certain brother will aid where his Father has not.

entry.title: What It Sounds Like
entry.summary:
Author: UltraCaffeinatedIvy

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,171Chapters: 13/15Kudos: 145

Summary: Things are mostly looking up for Jason Todd. He’s finally earned a scholarship to Gotham Academy and has a place that actually feels like home. He knows it's not some kind of cosmic reward for getting through a rough past, living through Catherine's addictions, his dad up and disappearing, or any of the other shit he's had to put up with. You get dealt your hand in life, for better or —more likley— worse, and try to make the best of it. Then Dick Grayson steps in. Or Where Pamela Isley adopts Jason Todd. Enrolls him in Gotham Academy and Jason struggles being a normal teenager, having friends and, of course, falls in love with Dick Grayson in the process. A coming of age story.

entry.title: Of All The Gin Joints, Right?
entry.summary:
Author: andthwip

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,138Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 64

Summary: “Rough night?” The voice comes from too close. Dick stiffens. He hadn’t expected to hear that voice tonight, certainly not here. Calm, steady, threaded with something he can’t quite place. Recognition washes over him slowly, like a hand on the back of his neck, grounding. “Yeah," Dick murmurs, lowering his hands from where he had put them over his eyes. The bar swims back into focus; lights blotchy as the last of the phosphines begin to fade. “Something like that.” There’s a pause. The kind that suggests he’s being observed. “You look like you need something stronger than a beer tonight, pretty boy.” The nickname lands softly, a faint edge underneath it. Concern, perhaps. “Want your usual?” Dick swallows, mouth dry. His thoughts slip back to Roman, sharp words, loud words - he doesn’t trust himself to unpack any of it out loud.

entry.title: penitence
entry.summary:
Author: L1VINGL3GEND

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,785Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 13

Summary: “P—” Damian paused, the word on the tip of his tongue. Pet. Jason watched him regain his composure with a slight clearing of his throat. Jason’s back straightened as if on instinct, and he hated himself for it. “Todd.” “What?” Jason snarled, just barely stopping himself from bearing his teeth at the younger. I’m not like that anymore, he reminded himself. I don’t have to be. or; jason acted as a mentor (and pet) to damian in the league, and now they both have to deal with the consequences

entry.title: Freefall
entry.summary:
Author: onArete

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 154,313Chapters: 26/33Kudos: 478

Summary: Being Robin feels like flying: steady, wind-whistle certainty that what he and Batman are doing is right. Even with his hands bloody, Dick doesn’t waver. He knows they’re doing good: permanently removing the murderers and criminals from Gotham. Of course, nobody can fly forever.

entry.title: red at the bone
entry.summary:
Author: badalice

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,756Chapters: 2/9Kudos: 35

Summary: Under the aegis of the Order of St. George, the House of Wayne has silently protected the children of Gotham from the monsters that stalk them for nearly two decades. Its members live dangerous, lonely lives, guardians of a secret that the Order will kill to keep safe. When Dick Grayson's estranged brother Jason Todd resurfaces in small town Kansas, on the trail of one of the most dangerous types of monsters the Order hunts and kills, House Dragon Bruce Wayne sends Dick to assist—and, just maybe, to bring Jason back into the fold. Some wounds, though, run too deep, and some promises lie too broken, and Dick knows all too well the welcome that he'll receive if he goes—but when it comes to Jason, he'll do whatever it takes.

entry.title: the hands-on approach
entry.summary:
Author: littlewing (satorusyuji)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,602Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 115

Summary: “Dick,” Jason intones. “What, pray tell, are you staring at?” Absently, Dick responds, “Nothing.” His hand starts to raise, reaching up between them. Jason watches it suspiciously as it approaches, but Dick continues forward like something is possessing him to move.  Up and up, until Jason realizes it’s about to touch his face. Except... it continues up past his chin, and Jason’s left staring down at Dick as it reaches for his hair. Dick’s fingertips meet Jason’s forehead, brushing aside the bangs curling there. Jason suppresses the small flinch at the touch and does nothing but stand dumbly as Dick’s hand progresses through his hair.  Why does it feel so damn… reverent? — Jason Todd's helmet hair vs. one Dick Grayson. What could possibly happen?

entry.title: Get My Pretty Name Outta Your Mouth
entry.summary:
Author: Reckoning1187

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,513Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 81

Summary: Nightwing died. No one wanted to believe it. But Jason had been put in the ground only a year before, and no one could deny it. The family was broken; Bruce threw himself into work, Tim left the manor, Damien went rogue, and Alfred– he just tried to keep everything from falling apart more than it already had.Months later, Dick Grayson woke up in a small hospital in Central City, alone, with nothing to his name, and no memory of ever being Robin or Nightwing. With no family and no calling, Dick followed the only lead to his past– Gotham City. And… the Red Hood? OrMy need to tell an atrociously-hurt/wonderfully-comfort fic about Jason being a traumatized and dangerous mafia boss, and Dick being a confused, traumatized, and yet wonderfully-powerful crime-boss-in-training. And then make them kiss.  :)

entry.title: Batcest: Dick is a Slut
entry.summary:
Author: rhaellu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,025Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

Summary: Dick and Jason get freaky in an alley, Jason calls him a slut and when some dudes see them they make Dick feel worse.After a bad night on patrol, he just wants to take a shower and get in bed with his other lovers: Tim and Damian, but they ALSO call him a slut and that's IT.He gets into a vicious fight with Jason and only Alfred's insight saves them from making more mistakes.Cue in: Dick's family and lovers comforting him, begging for forgiveness and talking about it. Gut-wrenching stuff here, so sorry Dick and Jason.Warning: underage because Tim and Damian are still minors.

entry.title: Renegade
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 315,585Chapters: 42/?Kudos: 2,412

Summary: Five years after Robin had vanished holding Starfire’s body, the second Robin, Jason Todd, disappeared on his second mission with the Teen Titans. When he woke up in an unfamiliar place, Jason had no idea what would happen to him in the coming months, and that soon he would know the former Robin—now Renegade—intimately, during his long captivity. Or: The one where Dick Grayson took Slade’s offer to be his apprentice and Jason pays the price. This fic now has a comic version!

entry.title: safe as houses
entry.summary:
Author: Areiton

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 616Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 58

Summary: There are, scattered throughout Gotham City, a warren of boltholes and safehouses.They aren't always used the way they should be.
